reelIdea: Aarav demonstrates how ProteinX is his secret weapon for breaking through strength plateaus and achieving sustainable gains.
hook: Hitting a plateau? This is how I break through.
storyStructure: Struggling with a heavy lift, looking fatigued.
Voiceover: 'The secret isn't just training harder...'
Show mixing and drinking ProteinX post-workout.
Quick text overlay: 'Faster Recovery. Stronger Lifts.'
Aarav performing a successful, strong lift with ease.
cta: Grab your ProteinX now – link in bio!
caption:
Ever felt stuck, like your gains just aren't happening? I've been there. We push hard in the gym, but true strength isn't just built under the bar – it's built in recovery. That's why I'm excited about ProteinX. It's not just another supplement; it's a game-changer for muscle repair and sustainable growth. 

After a brutal powerlifting session, my body demands the best, and ProteinX delivers. It helps me recover faster, so I can hit my next session stronger. If you're serious about your strength journey and want to break through those plateaus, you need to fuel your body right. 

ProteinX is now available – check it out and elevate your recovery game!
